verses.text: In the latter times some shall depart from the faith, forbidding to marry and to eat meats. Coming error. False teaching will turn from God's good gifts.
In the latter times some shall depart from the faith, forbidding to marry and to eat meats. Coming error. False teaching will turn from God's good gifts.
In the latter times some shall depart from the faith, forbidding to marry and to eat meats. Coming error. False teaching will turn from God's good gifts.
Every creature of God is good, received 'with thanksgiving,' 'sanctified by the word of God and prayer.' Good gifts. Thankfulness hallows what God gives.
Every creature of God is good, received 'with thanksgiving,' 'sanctified by the word of God and prayer.' Good gifts. Thankfulness hallows what God gives.
Bodily exercise profits little, but 'godliness is profitable unto all things,' with promise of life. Godliness gains. Piety profits for this life and the next.
Bodily exercise profits little, but 'godliness is profitable unto all things,' with promise of life. Godliness gains. Piety profits for this life and the next.
Bodily exercise profits little, but 'godliness is profitable unto all things,' with promise of life. Godliness gains. Piety profits for this life and the next.
We trust in the living God, 'the Saviour of all men, specially of those that believe.' Living hope. Our confidence rests in God.
We trust in the living God, 'the Saviour of all men, specially of those that believe.' Living hope. Our confidence rests in God.
We trust in the living God, 'the Saviour of all men, specially of those that believe.' Living hope. Our confidence rests in God.
Let none despise thy youth; be 'an example... in word, in conversation, in charity, in faith, in purity.' Set the pattern. A young minister leads by holy living.
Let none despise thy youth; be 'an example... in word, in conversation, in charity, in faith, in purity.' Set the pattern. A young minister leads by holy living.
Neglect not thy gift; give thyself wholly to these things; 'thou shalt both save thyself, and them that hear thee.' Faithful labour. Diligence in the word blesses self and hearers.
